actions.name: 条码编号_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 条码编号_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT cjcp.sid,
       cjcp.zyhh,
       cjcp.cpbh,
       cjcp.zwpm,
       cjcp.bgpm
FROM cjcp 
WHERE (cjcp.zyhh=[专业产品.条码编号]) 
ORDER BY cjcp.sid ASC

actions.name: 报关品名_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 报关品名_ButtonEdit

fields.caption: 退税率
fields.output: 专业产品.退 税 率

actions.expression:
SELECT hgbmbsheet.sid,
       hgbmbsheet.hgbm,
       hgbmbsheet.tsl,
       hgbmbsheet.zzsl,
       hgbmbsheet.hwmc,
       hgbmbsheet.cznr,
       hgbmbsheet.dw,
       hgbmbsheet.sfsj
FROM hgbmbsheet 
WHERE (hgbmbsheet.sfpz="是") 
ORDER BY hgbmbsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 海关编码事件
actions.caption: 海关编码事件

fields.caption: 退 税 率
fields.output: 专业产品.退 税 率

actions.expression:
SELECT hgbm.sid,hgbm.tsl 
FROM hgbm 
WHERE (hgbm.hgbm=[专业产品.海关编码]) 
ORDER BY hgbm.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_中文包装_英文包装
actions.caption: 事_中文包装_英文包装
actions.expression:
SELECT bzhfsh.sid,bzhfsh.ywbzh 
FROM bzhfsh 
WHERE (bzhfsh.zhwbzh=[专业产品.中文包装]) 
ORDER BY bzhfsh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_厂商编号_生产厂家
actions.caption: 事_厂商编号_生产厂家
actions.expression:
SELECT ozycs.sid,ozycs.company_name 
FROM ozycs 
WHERE (ozycs.cs_id=[专业产品.厂商编号]) 
ORDER BY ozycs.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 生产厂家_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 生产厂家_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT ozycs.company_name,ozycs.cs_id 
FROM ozycs 
ORDER BY ozycs.company_name ASC

actions.name: 分类查询_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 分类查询_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT zycpfenglb.mc,zycpfenglb.cpfl,zycpfenglb.yjfl,zycpfenglb.ejfl,zycpfenglb.sjfl  
FROM zycpfenglb

actions.name: 事_专业厂家id_专业厂家
actions.caption: 事_专业厂家id_专业厂家

fields.caption: 厂商名称
fields.output: 专业产品.工厂报价.专业厂家

actions.expression:
SELECT ozycs.company_name 
FROM ozycs 
WHERE (ozycs.cs_id=[专业产品.工厂报价.专业厂家id]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_专业厂家id1_专业厂家1
actions.caption: 事_专业厂家id1_专业厂家1

fields.caption: 厂商名称
fields.output: 专业产品.工厂报价.专业厂家1

actions.expression:
SELECT zycs.company_name 
FROM zycs 
WHERE (zycs.cs_id=[专业产品.工厂报价.专业厂家id1]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 工厂报价_专业厂家_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 工厂报价_专业厂家_ButtonEdit

fields.caption: 专业厂家
fields.output: 专业产品.工厂报价.专业厂家

fields.caption: 厂商编号
fields.output: 专业产品.工厂报价.专业厂家id

actions.expression:
SELECT ozycs.company_name,
       ozycs.cs_id,
       ozycs.cslxr,
       ozycs.lxrjb,
       ozycs.phone,
       ozycs.fax,
       ozycs.sjhm,
       ozycs.sfxy,
       ozycs.gsgm,
       ozycs.zhkp
FROM ozycs 
ORDER BY ozycs.company_name ASC

actions.name: 工厂报价_专业厂家1_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 工厂报价_专业厂家1_ButtonEdit

fields.caption: 专业厂家1
fields.output: 专业产品.工厂报价.专业厂家1

fields.caption: 厂商编号
fields.output: 专业产品.工厂报价.专业厂家id1

actions.expression:
SELECT zycs.company_name,zycs.cs_id 
FROM zycs 
ORDER BY zycs.company_name ASC

actions.name: 对应工厂资料
actions.caption: 对应工厂资料
actions.expression:
SELECT zycs.sid 
FROM zycs 
WHERE (zycs.cs_id=[专业产品.工厂报价.专业厂家id]) 
  AND permission('专业工厂') 
ORDER BY zycs.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应开模
actions.caption: 对应开模
actions.expression:
SELECT gckm.sid 
FROM gckm 
WHERE (gckm.cpbh=[专业产品.产品编号])
permission('工厂开模')
ORDER BY gckm.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-换汇成本
actions.caption: 计算-换汇成本
actions.expression: [专业产品.采购单价]/[专业产品.美金 FOB]

actions.name: 计算-出货总额
actions.caption: 计算-出货总额
actions.expression: [专业产品.工厂报价.采购总额]

actions.name: 计算-出货合计$
actions.caption: 计算-出货合计$
actions.expression: [专业产品.工厂报价.出货总额]

actions.name: 计算-美金 FOB
actions.caption: 计算-美金 FOB
actions.expression: [专业产品.采购单价]/[专业产品.换汇成本]
actions.output: 专业产品.工厂报价.美金 FOB

actions.name: 专业产品.美金 FOB
actions.caption: 专业产品.美金 FOB
actions.expression: [专业产品.采购单价]/[专业产品.换汇成本]

actions.name: 专业产品.外箱容量
actions.caption: 专业产品.外箱容量
actions.expression: [专业产品.内盒容量]*[专业产品.内盒/外箱]

actions.name: 增值税率
actions.expression:
SELECT zx.cs
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="增值税率") order by zx.cs desc
actions.caption: 增值税率

caption: 专业产品

view.params:
SELECT DISTINCT(khsheet3.company_name)
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   ((khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_)
 or  (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)) and (khsheet3.module1="客户资料")

SELECT jldw.dwdm,jldw.SID
FROM jldw
ORDER BY jldw.SID ASC

SELECT jldw.wwdw,jldw.SID
FROM jldw
ORDER BY jldw.SID ASC

是
否

SELECT csbg.csbg
FROM csbg
ORDER BY csbg.csbg ASC

SELECT cply.cply
FROM cply

SELECT zycpfenglb.cpfl
FROM zycpfenglb
group by zycpfenglb.cpfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.yjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[专业产品.产品大类]) group by zycpfenglb.yjfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.ejfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[专业产品.产品大类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[专业产品.一级分类])  group by zycpfenglb.ejfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.sjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[专业产品.产品大类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[专业产品.一级分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.ejfl=[专业产品.二级分类]) group by zycpfenglb.sjfl

SELECT  wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%跟单%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC
